title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY BASDIOT, MUNICIPALITY OF MOALBOAL, PROVINCE OF CEBU TO BE KNOWN AS THE MOALBOAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. NO. 6187 / 97 OG No. 32, 4725 (Aug. 6, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9074, April 08, 2001 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY BASDIOT, MUNICIPALITY OF MOALBOAL, PROVINCE OF CEBU TO BE KNOWN AS THE MOALBOAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established, under the supervision of the Department of Education, Culture and Sports, a national high school in Barangay Basdiot, Municipality of Moalboal, Province of Cebu to be known as the Moalboal National High School.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Education, Culture and Sports shall take the necessary steps for the establishment of the school so as to make it operational during the first school year after the effectivity of this Act.

SEC. 3. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

AQUILINO Q. PIMENTEL, JR.

(Sgd.) FELICIANO BELMONTE

, JR.

President of the Senate

Speaker of the

House of Representatives

This

Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on August 28, 2001 and February 5, 2000, respectively.

(Sgd.)

LUTGARDO B. BARBO

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: APR 08, 2001

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

President of the Philippines
